description: Agent Guard — automatic prompt-injection screening on every Codex tool call. PreToolUse screens the tool's input params (web fetch prompt, search query, shell command) and denies risky calls; PostToolUse screens the tool's returned content (web page text, file contents, MCP output) and blocks Codex from acting on a flagged result. Both reuse the Content Guard engine and ~/.agent-guard/content_guard.toml.

hooks.statusMessage: agent-guard: screening tool content for prompt injection
agent-guard: screening tool content for prompt injection
